system.description:
Master Dallicore is the Guildmaster for the Docker's Guild. They move all cargo on and off ships, boats, and gondolas. Their role is protected by law, as are the fees they charge. The guild uses low-level violence to discourage non-guild laborers and smugglers. However, some challenges require proper scoundrels.

Dallicore is not above hiring outsiders to punish powerful patrons of smugglers or illegal dock workers. His position of power also gives him access to rare antiquities, both purchased and acquired.
